title: X-tra Roasted Spanish (Galician) Pillowy Jamon Jamon Iberico Croquettes
description: Delicious roasted Spanish (Galician) croquettes filled with jamon iberico, perfect as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Fleur de sel or kosher salt

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the jamon iberico, bread, onion, garlic, vanilla pod, and egg. Mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before frying, dust the jamon mixture with flour, shaking off excess.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry the jamon mixture in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Transfer the fried jamon mixture to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
To assemble the croquettes, shape the fried jamon mixture into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place the croquettes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the X-tra Roasted Spanish (Galician) Pillowy Jamon Jamon Iberico Croquettes hot, garnished with fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
These croquettes are best served immediately, but can be refrigerated for up to 24 hours and reheated in the oven before serving.
